_README: Crons block staged for T6 R003 — NOT active. To enable: copy the `crons` array below into root vercel.json (merge with existing keys) and redeploy. Each firing counts toward Vercel's cron quota — flip live only after Ed approves quota. Routes: /api/dev/seed-demo (exists), /api/portal/ops/healthcheck (POST handler in @aqua/plugin-ops — see chapter #166 — verify it accepts GET from Vercel's cron invoker before flipping), /api/portal/ops/backup (endpoint pending — owner: T2 ops plugin). Auth: each cron path gates on NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_BYPASS=1 for the cron's environment OR a service token (chapter #163 §8).
